attributes.description: Overview of LiteLLM audit log activity.

params.markdown:
### Overview 

This dashboard provides visibility into LiteLLM audit log activity. It highlights audit event trends and user distribution across the environment. The dashboard helps administrators and security analysts monitor audit activity, identify most-modified objects, and understand user behavior.

Visualizations include total events and unique users metrics, events breakdown by action type, most modified objects listing, top users by activity, changes by table, and events over time. Interactive controls allow filtering by date range, user, table name, and action type for focused analysis and troubleshooting.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/lite_llm/overview)**

attributes.title: [Logs LiteLLM] Audit
